justification: The diff targets Java 17 (not 21) and Spring Boot 3.3, missing Java 21 idioms like virtual threads or pattern matching for switch. It correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates JUnit 4 to JUnit 5, but leaves deprecated patterns like explicit maven.compiler.source/target properties and doesn't fully clean up test imports (e.g., TestManagePassword.java still imports org.junit.runner.RunWith without updating to JUnit 5 equivalents).
